changelog: v1.5.20: In-app auto-update banner — one-click install, progress bar, 4-hour background check.
changes: NEW: Auto-update banner — shows at top of dashboard when new version is available
NEW: In-app download — [Install Now] streams KAM_Sentinel_Setup.exe with live progress bar
NEW: One-click install — app closes, installer launches, fresh version on next open
NEW: Error recovery — [Try Again] or [Download Manually →] on failure
NEW: Background check — version re-checked every 4 hours while app is running
FIX: Update check URL → GitHub Pages (kypin00-web.github.io/KAM-Sentinel/version.json)
